anti_claim: This organ validates a source-faithful public agent-execution trace refactor over sandbox policy replay rows plus synthetic regression inputs; it does not authorize live sandbox escape, live secret handling, live network access, host filesystem mutation, executable payload export, raw environment export, provider calls, security benchmark claims, source mutation, or release.

anti_claim_contract.rule: Sandbox policy-escape material must state that synthetic replay receipts are not live security, exploit, network, provider, benchmark, source-mutation, or release authority

omission_receipt.reason: public slice carries source-faithful trace-refactor mechanics over body-free sandbox policy rows and keeps secret/live-access material out

receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source refs, source pattern ids, action/policy/side-effect/rollback/cold-replay counts, negative-case coverage, private-state scan, authority ceiling, and anti-claim

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs stay path-level metadata, public replacements stay public-root relative, and copied non-secret macro bodies live under source_module_manifest.json plus source_modules/ with digest checks, material classes, and body-free receipts

standard_payload.anti_purpose: Treating a final answer, scary exploit story, live network denial, or benchmark result as sandbox-security evidence.
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe sandbox policy-escape replay: source-faithful public agent-execution trace spans over action requests, pre-execution policy verdicts, side-effect receipts, rollback receipts, cold replay, falsification fixtures, authority ceilings, and exact copied non-secret macro source modules for the local body floor.
standard_payload.teleology: Make Microcosm show how agent sandbox/security claims are admitted only when containment policy, diffs, rollback, negative cases, receipts, and ceilings align.

validation_rules: require synthetic action requests with public refs, risk classes, and no raw payload export
require pre-execution policy verdicts with rule refs for every action request
require blocked requests to have zero side effects and allowed/reviewed requests to have diff receipts
require rollback receipts for side-effecting allowed or reviewed actions
reject real secrets, live network, raw environment export, policy-after-execution, unlogged side effects, tool-output authority bypass, executable payloads, and security benchmark claims
emit redacted receipts and private-state scan
require exported sandbox-policy bundles to validate source_module_manifest.json, exact copied source_modules digests, public-safe material classes, and body-free receipt boundaries
